mapper.update: UPDATE study_plan SET question_set_id = #{questionSetId}, daily_count = #{dailyCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, question_set_id, daily_count, create_time, update_time FROM study_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM study_plan_record WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND status = 1
